parameters.query: =INSERT INTO workflow_events (client_id, workflow_name, event_type, payload) VALUES ('e2f9934c-4d28-4bb4-ac90-4284c1123517'::uuid, 'weekly_marketing_drip', 'triggered', json_build_object('execution_id', '{{ $execution.id }}')::jsonb)
SELECT lq.id, lq.listings FROM (SELECT 1) x LEFT JOIN LATERAL (SELECT id, listings FROM listing_queue WHERE status = 'pending' ORDER BY submitted_at DESC LIMIT 1) lq ON true

=INSERT INTO workflow_events (client_id, workflow_name, event_type, payload) VALUES ('e2f9934c-4d28-4bb4-ac90-4284c1123517'::uuid, 'weekly_marketing_drip', 'completed', json_build_object('execution_id', '{{ $execution.id }}', 'note', 'no_pending')::jsonb)

nodes.name: Build Fetch Items
nodes.notes: Fans out one item per submitted listing URL for the Fetch Listing Pages node.

nodes.name: Fetch Listing Pages
nodes.notes: Best-effort GET of the listing-detail page (runs once per listing). Response text lands in $json.data. On any error (e.g. transient 500), onError:continue passes the source item through so Build Cards degrades that card to address-only.

parameters.query: SELECT id, lead_name, email, client_id, encode(hmac(id::text, '8F68D963-7060-4033-BD04-7593E4B203CB', 'sha256'), 'hex') AS opt_out_token FROM leads WHERE client_id IN ('ded234e3-1c78-45c3-8924-6036e1fcaf60','451306d1-6437-42b8-8ffe-c16f28803490') AND email IS NOT NULL AND communication_opted_out != true

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { personalizations: [{ to: [{ email: $json.email, name: $json.lead_name }] }], from: { email: 'hello@norrai.co', name: $json.agent_name }, reply_to: { email: $json.agent_email, name: $json.agent_name }, subject: $json.subject, content: [{ type: 'text/html', value: $json.html }], tracking_settings: { click_tracking: { enable: false }, open_tracking: { enable: false } } } }}

parameters.query: =UPDATE listing_queue SET status = 'sent', sent_at = now() WHERE id = '{{ $('Build Cards').first().json.queue_id }}'

=INSERT INTO workflow_events (client_id, workflow_name, event_type, payload) VALUES ('e2f9934c-4d28-4bb4-ac90-4284c1123517'::uuid, 'weekly_marketing_drip', 'completed', json_build_object('execution_id', '{{ $execution.id }}', 'queue_id', '{{ $('Build Cards').first().json.queue_id }}', 'listings', {{ $('Build Cards').first().json.listing_count }})::jsonb)
